---
title: "AquaCache Database Schema Documentation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AquaCache Database Schema Documentation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library(AquaCache)
```

```{r content, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# Build the html reference
path <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
generateACDatabaseReference(
  output_file = path,
  standalone = FALSE,
  open = FALSE
)


# Including the html reference in the vignette
htmltools::includeHTML(path)
```
